1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect distinct quick-clay risk-class values in utlopomr

3.description: select utlopomr polygons with the high risk-class (value to be filled after inspection)

4.description: select buildings in Trondheim with bygningid and representasjonspunkt

5.description: reduce quick-clay polygons to Trondheim municipality (kommuner -> kvikkleire)

6.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced quick-clay polygons (buildings -> reduced kvikkleire)

7.description: collapse to one row per bygning (group by bygningid)

FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlopomr
WHERE skredrisikokvikkleireklasse IS NOT NULL

LIMIT 1;
